codeReview.summary: Implementation covers navbar Aptos wallet connection flow and meets INT-002 expectations (modal opens with Aptos wallets + Google/Apple, provider wraps app, connected state renders truncated address). One non-blocking gap remains: cross-chain derivation is configured but effectively disabled by an ethers v5/v6 incompatibility workaround.

issues.description: Cross-chain wallet derivation is not actually functional in this app: the provider documents and swallows import failures caused by ethers v6 requirements, so Ethereum/Solana derived wallet connection path is unavailable despite crossChainWallets=true configuration.

Derived-wallet packages are excluded from Vite optimizeDeps as a workaround for the ethers v5/v6 conflict, reinforcing that cross-chain derived wallets are currently best-effort rather than fully working.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fork-worker verification guidance conflicts with mission-level validation constraints, causing avoidable failed runs against known-broken suites.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fork-worker/SKILL.md:51 says to always run `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test`, while mission AGENTS explicitly scopes validation to core packages and notes known apps/trading failures (/Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/AGENTS.md:52,60,62).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The Aptos derived-wallet ethers-v6 incompatibility in apps/trading is a recurring implementation gotcha but is not captured in shared library notes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: apps/trading/package.json:209 pins ethers 5.7.2; Aptos provider acknowledges derived-wallet import failures (apps/trading/src/cash/providers/AptosWalletProvider.tsx:10,29,40). No corresponding note exists under .factory/library/.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit 5499ef8 diff, transcript skeleton, and fork-worker skill. The feature satisfies the required wallet integration behavior for navbar connect flow and connected address display, so review passes. Cross-chain derived wallet support remains degraded due the documented ethers compatibility workaround (non-blocking), and shared-state updates are recommended for skill validation guidance and library knowledge capture.
